prompt: A tall, clean single-panel meme, warm paper white background (#fffdf7), premium and minimal. Centered illustration of a long communal Texas meetup table with mismatched chairs, one chair pulled out slightly with a small reserved card on it. The reserved card reads exactly 'GUEST OF HONOR' in black, with a small NVIDIA wordmark rendered in NVIDIA green #76b900 beneath it. Above the table, the orange AITX open-arms mark hovers warmly like a welcome banner in AITX orange #ff4201. Big friendly black headline at the top reads exactly: 'NVIDIA pulled up. We saved them the good seat.' Soft warm lighting, hand-drawn cozy style, plenty of negative space, print-quality. Small 'AITX x NVIDIA' lockup at the bottom, AITX in orange #ff4201, NVIDIA in green #76b900.
